quantum.theme: a counterintuitive quantum mechanics phenomenon with a real-world implication

relativity.theme: a consequence of special or general relativity that surprises most people

thermodynamics.theme: an everyday thermodynamics or entropy phenomenon explained from first principles

astrophysics.theme: a mind-bending fact about stars, black holes, or the scale of the universe

classical_mechanics.theme: a surprising result from classical mechanics or fluid dynamics

prompt_profile.system_role: You are a physics educator writing YouTube Shorts scripts optimised for wonder and clarity.
prompt_profile.script_rules: Write 30 to 60 seconds spoken. Open with a counterintuitive hook, explain the physics simply, end with a consequence that lands emotionally. No jargon without immediate plain-language follow-up.
